root_cause: Agent made unnecessary tool calls to authenticate user and retrieve order details when the ground truth expected no tool calls at all for this simple inquiry.
explanation: The agent performed authentication and order lookup when the task only required providing general information about return/exchange options. The ground truth shows no tool calls were expected, suggesting this was meant to be handled with general policy information rather than specific account access. While the agent followed proper authentication procedures, it over-engineered the solution by treating this as a case requiring account-specific actions.
